sponsors.name: Jio Platforms Limited
sponsors.why: As a leading Indian company with a strong focus on AI, Jio Platforms Limited is likely to sponsor an AI event in India
sponsors.approach: Reach out to Abhishek Farkade, SVP - Product & Engineering, GenAI & AI Platforms

sponsors.name: Meta
sponsors.why: As a previous silver supporter of AI Days, Meta has shown interest in sponsoring AI events in India
sponsors.approach: Contact Meta's Indian office to discuss potential sponsorship opportunities

sponsors.name: Infosys
sponsors.why: As a leading Indian tech company, Infosys is likely to be interested in sponsoring an AI event in India
sponsors.approach: Reach out to Infosys's innovation team to discuss potential sponsorship opportunities

sponsors.name: Wipro
sponsors.why: As another major Indian tech company, Wipro may be interested in sponsoring an AI event in India
sponsors.approach: Contact Wipro's marketing team to discuss potential sponsorship opportunities

sponsors.name: Indian Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
sponsors.why: As a government institution, the Ministry may be interested in supporting an AI event in India
sponsors.approach: Reach out to the Ministry's department of IT and electronics to discuss potential sponsorship opportunities

sponsors.name: Software Technology Parks of India
sponsors.why: As an organization that supports IT and electronics in India, STPI may be interested in sponsoring an AI event
sponsors.approach: Contact Shri Arvind Kumar, Director General of STPI, to discuss potential sponsorship opportunities

speakers.name: Abhishek Farkade
speakers.title: SVP - Product & Engineering, GenAI & AI Platforms, Jio Platforms Limited
speakers.why: As a leader in Jio Platforms, Abhishek can share insights on implementing AI in the Indian telecom industry.

speakers.name: Akhilesh Tuteja
speakers.title: Partner & National Leader, Cl
speakers.suggested_slot: Panel: AI Adoption in Indian Businesses
speakers.why: Akhilesh's experience in consulting can provide valuable perspectives on AI adoption in Indian companies.

speakers.name: Shri Arvind Kumar
speakers.title: Director General, Software Technology Parks of India
speakers.suggested_slot: Talk: AI Policy and Regulations in India
speakers.why: As the Director General of STPI, Shri Arvind Kumar can discuss the current AI policies and future directions in India.

speakers.name: Dr. Pankaj Jalote
speakers.title: Director, Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi
speakers.why: As a renowned academic, Dr. Pankaj Jalote can lead a workshop on AI research and innovation in Indian institutions.

speakers.name: Andrew Ng
speakers.title: Founder, AI Fund and former Chief Scientist, Baidu
speakers.suggested_slot: Keynote: Global AI Trends and Future Directions
speakers.why: As a global AI expert, Andrew Ng can provide a comprehensive overview of AI trends and future directions worldwide.

speakers.name: Dr. Gaurav Gupta
speakers.title: Assistant Professor, Indian Institute of Technology, Bombay
speakers.suggested_slot: Talk: Advances in AI and Machine Learning
speakers.why: As a researcher and academic, Dr. Gaurav Gupta can share recent advances and breakthroughs in AI and machine learning.

venues.name: The Leela Ambience Convention Hotel, Delhi
cons: Traffic in Delhi can be challenging

ticket_tiers.name: Early Bird (Student)
ticket_tiers.perks: 10% discount for students with valid ID

ticket_tiers.name: Early Bird (Startup)
ticket_tiers.perks: 20% discount for startups with valid ID

ticket_tiers.name: Standard
ticket_tiers.perks: Access to all sessions, networking opportunities

ticket_tiers.name: VIP
ticket_tiers.perks: Exclusive meet-and-greet with speakers, priority access to sessions

ticket_tiers.name: Virtual
ticket_tiers.perks: Access to live streaming of all sessions

pricing.rationale: Based on research of similar AI conferences in India and internationally, we have set competitive ticket prices with discounts for students, startups, and early bird registrations. Our revenue projection is based on an optimistic attendance forecast of 1200 attendees, with a total revenue of $158,000.

channels.name: LinkedIn
channels.strategy: Create engaging content (blog posts, videos, podcasts) to showcase the conference's value proposition and attract attendees. Utilize LinkedIn Ads to target relevant professionals and organizations.

channels.name: Twitter/X
channels.strategy: Utilize Twitter Ads to target relevant professionals and organizations. Share engaging content, such as tweets, videos, and live streams, to create buzz around the conference.

channels.name: Facebook/Instagram
channels.strategy: Utilize Facebook and Instagram Ads to target relevant professionals and organizations. Create engaging content, such as videos, stories, and reels, to create buzz around the conference.

channels.name: Email Marketing
channels.strategy: Create targeted email campaigns to promote the conference to relevant professionals and organizations. Utilize email marketing automation tools to personalize and optimize email campaigns.

timeline.action: Launch event website and early bird tickets. Utilize social media to create buzz around the conference.
Create and publish engaging content (blog posts, videos, podcasts) to showcase the conference's value proposition and attract attendees.
Utilize online advertising (LinkedIn Ads, Twitter Ads, Facebook Ads) to target relevant professionals and organizations.
Create and send targeted email campaigns to promote the conference to relevant professionals and organizations.
Utilize social media to create buzz around the conference. Share engaging content, such as tweets, videos, and live streams.

key_messages: India's premier AI conference featuring 60+ speakers and cutting-edge AI innovations.
Join us for AI Days 2025, India's leading artificial intelligence conference.
Meet the experts and thought leaders in the AI industry.
Discover the latest AI trends and innovations.
Network with AI professionals and organizations.

outreach_templates.sponsor_subject: Partner with us to showcase your organization's expertise in AI.
outreach_templates.speaker_subject: Join us as a speaker and share your knowledge with the AI community.
outreach_templates.email_body:
Dear [Name],

We are excited to invite you to AI Days 2025, India's premier AI conference. The conference will feature 60+ speakers and cutting-edge AI innovations. We believe that your expertise and knowledge would be a valuable addition to the conference.

Please find the details of the conference below:

* Date: [Date]
* Location: [Location]
* Speakers: [Speakers]

We would be happy to discuss further and answer any questions you may have. Please feel free to reach out to us.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

tasks.task: Establish event budget and financial plan
Create event website and registration process
Arrange for audio-visual equipment and technical support
Book accommodations for speakers and sponsors
Coordinate with venue staff and vendors
Arrange for speaker travel and accommodations
Arrange for sponsor travel and accommodations
Launch event website and registration process
Create and distribute event promotional materials
Develop and execute social media marketing plan
Plan and execute email marketing campaigns
Monitor event progress and make adjustments

feedback.sponsor: The sponsor suggestions are highly relevant and specific to the Indian market, with a clear approach for outreach.
feedback.speaker: The speaker suggestions are excellent, with a good mix of expertise and influence in the AI field, particularly in India.
feedback.venue: The venue suggestions are good, but could be more detailed in terms of logistics and catering options.
feedback.pricing: The pricing tiers are well-structured, but could benefit from more information on the perks and benefits for each tier.
feedback.gtm: The GTM strategy is somewhat generic and could be more tailored to the specific event and target audience in India.
